Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JEREMY LYNN Notice of Hearing on Petition to Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award. Appearances: Brian E. Soriano, of Goldstein, Gellamn, Melbostad, Gibson & Harris, LLP (415) 673-5600, appearing for Petitioner Jeremy Lynn. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order confirming contractual arbitration award signed in open Court.(302PHA)Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
